subcodes.first_line: O ye branches of the divine Lote-Tree! At all times and under all conditions We are occupied with thoughts of you, and through the grace of His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنون سدره رحمانیه در جمیع احوال و احیان بیاد شما مشغولیم و از فضل حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness
